name: BytePack
description: Header-only C++17 serialization library with zero dynamic allocation. One io() per struct drives serialize, deserialize and compile-time sizing, little-endian. Quant and Bytes types, headers and dispatch. Pairs with ByteFrame for stream framing.
keywords: serialization, deserialization, binary, pack, unpack, message, protocol, wire, frame, little-endian, constexpr, header-only, embedded, arduino, esp32, static
